news.t: The Ex-China Files: ETFs to Watch Amid Trump's High-Stakes Visit
AVANTIS INVESTORS® LAUNCHES NEW ACTIVE EMERGING MARKETS ETF

holdings.infoBox: AVXC is an equity ETF with a total of 2806 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.02%, SK hynix at 9.45%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR at 7.43%, MediaTek at 1.35%, and United Microelectronics at 1.03%.

overview.description: The Avantis Emerging Markets ex-China Equity ETF (AVXC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in emerging market companies (excluding China) with high profitability and value characteristics. The fund seeks long-term capital growth AVXC was launched on Mar 19, 2024 and is issued by American Century Investments.
